feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Table Storing User-Specific Settings for SPRO Display
entry.content:
Hello,

In the transaction SPRO, it is possible to set 'User Specific Setting'.

Where are these settings stored ? as I would like to apply the same setting for a number of users.

Many thanks.

entry.title: IWSV service available in 'System A' but missing in 'System B' in USOBHASH table
entry.content:
For one of the fiori app, we see both IWSV and IWSG service entries available in USOBHASH table in DEV ('System A') system. However in our UAT system ('System B') entry for IWSV service is missing in USOBHASH table. Please help us with the steps to make it available in 'System B' too or please let us know if there is way to transport it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: T-code Remove from multiple roles in one short
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to removed T-code from multiples role in one short please suggest how to remove.

Regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Activation of CREDITMANAGEMENTACCOUNTBYIDQU1 web service
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the standard web service CREDITMANAGEMENTACCOUNTBYIDQU1 which doesn't work on the production environment, I would like to activate it, can you please tell me how?

THANKS

entry.title: S_RS_CDS_X vs S_RS_CDS_S
entry.content:
Dear BW / HANA Experts,

Could you please provide some details on Auth objects S_RS_CDS_X vs S_RS_CDS_S. As i checked in google, the documents are not available.

Thanks.

entry.title: What's the Purpose of Authorization Transactions SU01, SU22, SU24 and SU25?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like get some Information on Authorization Transactions like SU01 SU22 SU24 and SU25, What and How exactly these transactions serve their Purpose?

entry.title: Post Upgrade - Profile Generator (SU25) - Support Required
entry.content:
Recently, Upgrade has been done from SAP S4 2020 to 2023.

Problem Statement-
Post upgrade, we performed SU25 2A, 2B, 2C Steps and found a very high number of roles (some thousands) got impacted due to the changes made in 2A, 2B with addition, deletion, updation of authorization
values.
To go and review that very high number of roles is difficult since it involves manual task.

Concerns / Queries for which supprt is needed:

  1. In which step (2A/2B/2C), role changes will happen?
    2. Once 2C is executed, will all the roles be changed before merge? if yes, what is the use of "Merge"?
    3. Post merge, will the role get updated with new values immediately?
    4. Is there a way where we can stop updating the new values post executing 2A, 2B, 2C?
    5. Is there a way to identify roles that will be modified during 2A, 2B?
    6. What will be the conseqences on existing user's access if we do not execute 2A, 2B, 2C post upgrade?
    7. Post executing of 2c merger of authorization, do we need immediate action on the roles / we can take our own time to analyze and fix?
    8. Is there a way where we can retain old values to the roles post executing 2A, 2B, 2C?

Regards,

Security team.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ROLES, OBJETOS DE AUTORIZACIONES,PERFILES SAP BASIS
entry.content:
How can I see the objects authorization of a transaction and, how can I configure the authorizations o permissions.

Thank you

Como puedo ver los objetos de autorización de una transacción y como puedo configurarla para dar los accesos o permisos necesarios.

Gracias

entry.title: IDM user provisioning - Different SNC names for same user
entry.content:
We have SAP systems A and B in our landscape. Only B is moving on RISE.

A lot of users have access to both A and B.

After RISE migration, SNC configuration will result into a different SNC name for users in system B.

So, a user account needs different SNC names in A and B. Is IDM capable of handling this while provisioning users to backend SAP systems ?

entry.title: Object /SAPLOM/CL, it is present in SU21. But when I check SU22 & SU24 is not present.
entry.content:
Hi,

The object /SAPLOM/CL is present in SU21, but it is not in SU22 or SU24. How can I bring this object into SU22 and SU25? This information is from the development system. However, when I search for the same object in the production system, it is not present in SU21. As a result, when I manually add the object to a role and transport it to the production system, the role is not generated in production.

How can I resolve this issue? Please guide me.

Regards

entry.title: SACF scenarios were automatically set to productive with Active check after using SWPM
entry.content:
The SAP S/4HANA Production application servers were migrated (Hardware migration). The SAP standard Software provisioning tool (SWPM) was used to perform this migration using the System copy option. There was no change at the Database side.

After this migration, we found that SWPM has by default set the SACF scenarios to Productive and Active. SWPM logs confirm that the Functional module SACF_SET_SBD was run due to which the scenarios were activated.

Before migration, these scenarios were not active at all. But post migration, with the scenarios active, users are facing issues while accessing various apps.

For some reason, we didn't have this issue in our lower environments, but are facing this in Production.

What would be the best approach to fix these issues in production, since we don't have the SACF productive scenarios active in lower environments? 

Would disabling the SACF productive scenarios help to get the Production back to normal?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: Authorizations ME51N - I want to disable Save Action
entry.content:
Hello community , 

in my role i have transactions ME51N/ME52N/ME53N.

I want to disable on users to make Save - Create PR , but i want to have access to Hold / Park the PR 

How to disable the Save Button Activity ?

Thanks.

entry.title: Include Workflow tasks in authorization role on productive system
entry.content:
Hello,

we built a new authorization role on the S/4 development system including several workflow tasks.
After transport of the role into our test system, the workflow components were not included in the role anymore and had to be added manually in PFCG.

This is okay for the test system. But our authorizations are strictly limited on the productive system and no one is allowed to change roles on the productive system directly.

How can we achive a transport of the role including the workflow tasks, or is there any other solution to add these to the role?

Thanks,

Julia

entry.title: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help with your inputs on the below case.

We have one HANA Stored Procedure. This is a directly created as a Catalog object by some Developer & that got migrated to Production as well.  He is the Owner of that Procedure , as its created by his ID.

Now that Developer has left the Organization , we want to grant that Procedure ( Catalog object) with EXECUTE privilege to some Technical ID which needs to call that procedure from external system ( ex: Informatica).

How can we assign that access to that technical ID , as the Developer is no longer available? 

In this case SYSTEM user also will not have access to grant access to other except the Owner.

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content:
Hi,

inside the RIAFRU20 report enanchment I have to read the RSTXT-TXLINE field 

 

I have already tried the FM READ_TEXT but it wants the "Name" as input, I don't know the "Name" inside the enhancement 

how can i do?

entry.title: Access Restriction for TPM60 Transaction
entry.content:
Hi,
I got a request to restrict TPM60 transaction access only to allow test run. I've limited all the authorizations to display only but still when we execute it without test run it is updating the NPV's. Can any one help me on how to restrict the access only to allow for test run.


Thank you in advance.


Best Regards,
Sumanth P

entry.title: USMM2 measurment 1160 fails with error You are not authorized to execute this program.
entry.content:
In my monthly run of USMM2 in a SAP ERP 7.50 system, the Measurement of application 1160 ("SAP Solutions by OpenText") fails with an error "You are not authorized to execute this program." (Message no. /OTX/PF09_M_001023). Apparently this is a new measurement, because it is not present in last month's report. 
In september we updated component OTEXVIM to version 80700_006, SP 0005.
Did anyone else encounter the same error and have any idea how to solve the authorization issue?

entry.title: No Where-Used List for the Authorization Object in SE80/SU21 after S/4 HANA 2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
After the system upgrade from S/4 HANA 2021 to S/4 HANA 2023, the Where-Used List for authorization objects in SE80/SU21 disappeared.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Same profile naming in development and quality systems
entry.content:
Hi,
SHD an SHQ were our development and quality systems, but now, we have a new system:
SDH (development system)
SQH (quality System)
So, when we created new role and a new profile is assigned automatically in old systems, this profile name was T-SDxxxxxx (DEV) and T-SQxxx (QAS) respectively.
Now, when we create new roles and profiles automatically in new systems, the profile name begins with same nomenclature T-SHxxxx and it is generating incidents.
Could you please help us with this issue?
Is these any OSS Note to apply? or could you tell us how change the beginning of the profile name T-YYxxxxx?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
